title: tabernaemontana markgrafiana
intro: Tabernaemontana markgrafiana, also known as the Yellow Mandrake, is a species of plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Madagascar. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana markgrafiana include relief from menstrual cramps, fever reduction, and improved respiratory function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and utilize them for therapeutic purposes.
